arts.ttl: Millwall set to escape FA rap for fans' vile 'let him die' chant to Jean-Philippe Mateta
arts.sum: Crystal Palace's 3-1 win over Millwall in the FA Cup was overshadowed by a sickening head injury to Jean-Philippe Mateta, who was hit in the head by a flying kick from Liam Roberts

arts.ttl: Liam Roberts’ challenge on Jean-Philippe Mateta ‘could have ended career’
arts.sum: Millwall manager Alex Neil also admitted it was a red card offence, but defended his goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Millwall boss disagrees with angry Crystal Palace chief over Jean-Philippe Mateta incident
arts.sum: Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta was on the receiving end of a kung-fu kick from Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts, who was shown a red card in Saturday's FA Cup fifth-round tie

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace captain reveals team's immediate reaction to Jean-Philippe Mateta injury
arts.sum: Marc Guehi among those to send best wishes to Jean-Philippe Mateta after Crystal Palace team-mate was knocked out by horror tackle from Millwall's Liam Roberts

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Jean-Philippe Mateta breaks silence after being rushed to hospital following horror tackle
arts.sum: Jean-Philippe Mateta was at the heart of a sickening incident during Crystal Palace's FA Cup clash with Millwall as he was stretchered off following an awful challenge from Lions goalkeeper Liam Roberts

arts.ttl: Steve Parish Gives Jean-Philippe Mateta Health Update After Horror Injury
arts.sum: Jean-Philippe Mateta is stable and conscious following a kung-fu kick during Crystal Palace's FA Cup victory over Millwall.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace give update on ‘serious’ Jean-Philippe Mateta injury after Millwall keeper’s horror challenge
arts.sum: Mateta was on the receiving end of a horrific challenge during Palace’s FA Cup win over Millwall

arts.ttl: Jean-Philippe Mateta has 'very serious' injury as Crystal Palace boss fumes at tackle
arts.sum: Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta was rushed to hospital after being involved in a sickening incident during his side’s FA Cup clash with Millwall with Oliver Glasner and Steve Parish left furious

arts.ttl: Glasner on Mateta injury and win over Millwall
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner gave his reaction to Crystal Palace’s 3-1 win over Millwall at Selhurst Park, including an early update on Jean-Philippe Mateta, who was stretchered off early in the contest.

arts.ttl: FA to investigate homophobic chanting from Millwall fans towards Ben Chilwell during ill-tempered FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Crystal Palace's victory over Millwall in Saturday's London derby in the FA Cup was marred by offensive chanting by a section of the away fans at Selhurst Park.
